1 attachment (3 MB)
MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf;

findings.text: Email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra includes a 3 MB attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'.
The extracted text artifact (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0029) does not contain the binary content of the embedded Student Licence PDF; only the email text was extracted.
No binary extraction tool is available in the current toolset to extract the embedded PDF from NAP-SRC-0029.

proposed_artifacts.content: Binary extraction of embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0029 was not possible with the current toolset. The email attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB) is referenced but not extracted. A follow-up task is proposed to use a configured binary extraction tool or request human setup.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction result for Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0029

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a configured binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, 7z, or custom script) to extract the embedded PDF attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from source NAP-SRC-0029. If no such tool is available, request human setup of a binary extraction tool.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0029 using binary extraction tool

risk_flags.text: The Student Licence PDF content is missing; without it, the tenancy terms and conditions cannot be verified.

summary: Task requires binary extraction of an embedded Student Licence PDF from source NAP-SRC-0029. The extracted text artifact (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0029) shows the email references a 3 MB attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' but the PDF text extraction did not capture the embedded PDF binary content. No binary extraction tool is available in the current toolset. A follow-up task is proposed to use a configured binary extraction tool or request human setup.

uncertainties.text: Whether the embedded Student Licence PDF can be extracted using a binary extraction tool not currently configured in the harness.
